name: TableCharts MCP Server
description: Turn JSON, CSV, Notion databases, Google Sheets, and Salesforce reports into beautiful hosted interactive dashboards and charts. Auto-recommends the best chart type, supports live embeds, and ships with stdio + Streamable HTTP transports — drop-in ready for Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, ChatGPT, and Gemini Enterprise agents.

screenshots.caption: Bar chart — Sales by Region, from a Google Sheet
Line chart — Weekly Active Users, from a Notion database
Donut chart — Revenue Mix by Product, from a Salesforce report
Radar chart — multi-metric Product Score from a CSV upload

TABLECHARTS_API_KEY.description: Your TableCharts API key from tablecharts.co (starts with tc_live_...)

TABLECHARTS_API_BASE.description: Optional base URL for the TableCharts API

PORT.description: Optional HTTP port to enable Streamable HTTP transport (e.g. 3000). Omit for stdio mode.

MCP_TRANSPORT.description: Force transport: 'stdio' (default for local clients) or 'http' (for Gemini Enterprise / remote).
